name: acryl-datahub-dagster-plugin

metadata.name: acryl-datahub-dagster-plugin
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Datahub Dagster plugin to capture executions and send to Datahub

documentation:
# Datahub Dagster Plugin

See the DataHub Dagster docs for details.

modules.name: datahub_dagster_plugin
documentation: Published at https://pypi.org/project/acryl-datahub/.

functions.name: datahub_dagster_plugin.sensors.datahub_sensors.make_datahub_sensor
documentation:
Create a sensor on job status change emit lineage to DataHub.

Args:
    config (DatahubDagsterSourceConfig): DataHub Sensor config
    name: (Optional[str]): The name of the sensor. Defaults to "datahub_sensor".
    minimum_interval_seconds: (Optional[int]): The minimum number of seconds that will elapse
        between sensor evaluations.
    default_status (DefaultSensorStatus): Whether the sensor starts as running or not. The default
        status can be overridden from Dagit or via the GraphQL API.

Examples:
    .. code-block:: python

        datahub_sensor = make_datahub_sensor(
           config
        )

        @repository
        def my_repo():
            return [my_job + datahub_sensor]

methods.name: datahub_dagster_plugin.client.dagster_generator.DagsterGenerator.asset_keys_to_dataset_urn_converter
documentation:
Convert asset key to dataset urn

By default we assume the following asset key structure:
key_prefix=["prod", "snowflake", "db_name", "schema_name"]

methods.name: datahub_dagster_plugin.client.dagster_generator.DagsterGenerator.generate_dataflow
documentation:
Generates a Dataflow object from an Dagster Job Snapshot
\:param job_snapshot: JobSnapshot - Job snapshot object
\:param env: str
\:param platform_instance: Optional\[str\]
\:return: DataFlow - Data generated dataflow

methods.name: datahub_dagster_plugin.client.dagster_generator.DagsterGenerator.generate_datajob
documentation:
Generates a Datajob object from an Dagster op snapshot
\:param job_snapshot: JobSnapshot - Job snapshot object
\:param step_deps: Dict\[str, List\] - step dependencies
\:param op_def_snap: OpDefSnap - Op def snapshot object
\:param env: str
\:param platform_instance: Optional\[str\]
\:param output_datasets: dict\[str, Set\[DatasetUrn\]\] - output datasets for each op
\:param input_datasets: dict\[str, Set\[DatasetUrn\]\] - input datasets for each op
\:return: DataJob - Data generated datajob

methods.name: datahub_dagster_plugin.client.dagster_generator.DagsterGenerator.emit_job_run
documentation:
Emit a latest job run
\:param graph: DatahubRestEmitter
\:param dataflow: DataFlow - DataFlow object
\:param run: DagsterRun - Dagster Run object
\:param run_stats: DagsterRunStatsSnapshot - latest job run stats

methods.name: datahub_dagster_plugin.client.dagster_generator.DagsterGenerator.emit_op_run
documentation:
Emit an op run
\:param graph: DataHubGraph
\:param datajob: DataJob - DataJob object
\:param run_step_stats: RunStepKeyStatsSnapshot - step(op) run stats
